dbtools
*******


Description
===========

Use the Database Tools CLI to manage connections, private endpoints,
and work requests in the Database Tools service.


Available Commands
==================

* connection

  * add-lock

  * change-compartment

  * create-generic-jdbc

  * create-mysql-database

  * create-oracle-database

  * create-postgresql

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * remove-lock

  * update-generic-jdbc

  * update-mysql-database

  * update-oracle-database

  * update-postgresql

  * validate-mysql-database

  * validate-oracle-database

  * validate-postgresql

* database-api-gateway-config

  * add-lock

  * change-compartment

  * create-database-api-gateway-config-default

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * remove-lock

  * update-database-api-gateway-config-default

* endpoint-service

  * get

  * list

* identity

  * add-lock

  * change-compartment

  * create-oracle-database-resource-principal

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * refresh-oracle-database-resource-principal-credential

  * remove-lock

  * update-oracle-database-resource-principal

  * validate-oracle-database-resource-principal-credential

* mcp-server

  * add-lock

  * cascading-delete

  * change-compartment

  * create-mcp-server-default

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * remove-lock

  * update-mcp-server-default

* mcp-toolset

  * add-lock

  * change-compartment

  * create-mcp-toolset-built-in-sql-tools

  * create-mcp-toolset-custom-sql-tool

  * create-mcp-toolset-customizable-reporting-tools

  * create-mcp-toolset-gen-ai-sql-assistant

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * remove-lock

  * update-mcp-toolset-built-in-sql-tools

  * update-mcp-toolset-custom-sql-tool

  * update-mcp-toolset-customizable-reporting-tools

  * update-mcp-toolset-gen-ai-sql-assistant

* mcp-toolset-version-collection

  * list-mcp-toolset-version

* private-endpoint

  * add-lock

  * change-compartment

  * create

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * remove-lock

  * update

* sql-report

  * add-lock

  * change-compartment

  * create-sql-report-oracle-database

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * remove-lock

  * update-sql-report-oracle-database

* work-request

  * get

  * list

* work-request-error

  * list

* work-request-log-entry

  * list
